narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp N (precinct in Warren County) has 975 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.2 percentage points.
